name: @siliconcorerina/rina-orchestrator
description: Multi-agent orchestrator powered by RINA AI — plans a goal into atomic steps, dispatches them to specialised sub-agents (browser, code, research). Ships a CLI and an HTTP worker that streams AgentEvents via SSE so a web UI can drive it remotely. MIT, Playwright-backed, multi-backend (DeepSeek, OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral) via @siliconcorerina/rina-agent's Backend abstraction.
author: Silicon Core <hello@plateforme-rina.com>
